title: Successful User Authentication and Session Establishment
description: Verify that the user can authenticate successfully with valid credentials and a session is maintained.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input valid user credentials into the login form.
Submit the login request.
Confirm the user is authenticated and redirected to the MyPage dashboard.
Confirm that the user session is maintained during navigation within the app.

title: Failed Authentication with Invalid Credentials
description: Check that the system rejects login attempts with incorrect username or password and provides an appropriate error message.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input invalid username and/or password.
Attempt to submit the login request.
Verify the system rejects login and displays a clear error message indicating the failure.

title: MyPage Dashboard Loads Correctly in Desktop Environment
description: Ensure the MyPage dashboard loads completely without hanging or infinite loading and displays all core elements correctly in a desktop/PC environment.

steps.description: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to the MyPage dashboard on a desktop or PC environment.
Verify that the dashboard page fully loads without any infinite loops or hanging states.
Confirm that user profile information is displayed accurately.
Confirm that the list of children is visible and populated with correct data.
Verify reading statistics for each child are rendered correctly.

title: Display and Accuracy of User Profile Information
description: Validate that the user profile data displayed on the MyPage dashboard matches the backend data and updates appropriately.

steps.description: Log into the application and navigate to MyPage dashboard.
Check that all fields in the user profile (e.g., username, email) are accurately displayed as received from the backend.
Update user profile data via backend or API directly.
Refresh the dashboard.
Validate that the updated profile data is reflected correctly in the UI.

title: Listing Child Profiles in the Dashboard
description: Verify that all child profiles associated with the authenticated user are listed correctly in the MyPage dashboard.

steps.description: Log in as a user with multiple children.
Navigate to the MyPage dashboard.
Validate that the children list shows all child profiles belonging to the user.
Verify that each child's basic info (name, age if shown) is correctly displayed.

title: Child Profile Management - Add New Child
description: Test the ability to add a new child profile via the MyPage dashboard interface and verify it appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to MyPage dashboard.
Access the add child profile form.
Input valid information for a new child.
Submit the new child profile.
Confirm the new child profile is added successfully and appears in the child list.

title: Child Profile Management - Edit Existing Child Profile
description: Verify that a user's child profile can be updated correctly and changes persist.

steps.description: Select an existing child profile from the dashboard.
Edit fields such as name or age.
Save the changes.
Check that updated child details are correctly saved and displayed in the dashboard.

title: Reading Statistics Visualization per Child
description: Ensure that reading statistics for each child are correctly retrieved from backend and displayed on the dashboard in a comprehensible format.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to MyPage dashboard.
Locate the reading statistics section for a child.
Confirm that statistics data (e.g., number of books read, reading progress) matches backend data.
Verify that the visualization components render properly with no graphical glitches.

title: Display of Books Read List for Each Child
description: Validate that the system fetches and displays detailed lists of books read per child accurately on the MyPage dashboard.

steps.description: Select a specific child profile on the dashboard.
View the list of books read by that child.
Ensure all books read are correctly listed with relevant details such as title and read date.

title: UI Responsiveness and Layout on Desktop
description: Confirm that the user dashboard UI adapts responsively and renders correctly on desktop screen sizes using Tailwind CSS styling.

steps.description: Access MyPage dashboard on various desktop screen resolutions.
Verify the layout adjusts appropriately without content overlapping or being cut off.
Confirm all interactive elements remain usable and visible.

title: Session Termination on Logout
description: Ensure that when the user logs out, the session ends properly and the user is redirected to the login or home page.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to MyPage dashboard.
Use the logout button or link to end the session.
Confirm the user session is terminated and user is redirected to login or landing page.
Attempt to navigate back to MyPage dashboard using browser back button.
Verify that access is restricted and the user is redirected again to login.

title: Handling No Children Associated with User
description: Verify the dashboard behavior when a user has no children profiles associated, ensuring proper messaging and UI handling.

steps.description: Log in as a user with no child profiles.
Navigate to MyPage dashboard.
Confirm a friendly message is displayed indicating no children profiles are found.
Verify that UI prompts the user to add a child profile.

title: Handling No Books Read for a Child
description: Ensure that when a child has no recorded read books, the dashboard displays appropriate messaging and no errors occur.

steps.description: Log in and select a child profile that has no read books recorded.
Check that an appropriate message indicating no books read is shown.
Verify that no empty or broken UI elements are present.

title: Backend Data Fetch Failure Handling on Dashboard Load
description: Test the system’s response and error handling when backend calls for user profile, children list, or reading stats fail during dashboard load.

steps.description: Simulate backend failure or timeout for profile, children list, or reading stats APIs.
Attempt to load the MyPage dashboard.
Confirm appropriate error messages or UI indicators are shown.
Verify the dashboard does not hang or crash and allows retry or graceful fallback.
